overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a player character walking beneath a massive steel railway trestle bridge along a riverbank. A steam locomotive passes overhead emitting thick black smoke, after which the character continues walking through the natural riverside landscape with rocky outcrops and dense vegetation.

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the bridge deck and sky above

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the dirt path under the bridge, examining the steel structure and river view

entered.detail: massive iron railway bridge with lattice support structure spanning the river
calm reflective water surface with sun glare
steep rock face with sparse vegetation on opposite bank
worn dirt trail along the riverbank under the bridge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a massive steel railway trestle bridge, with the camera walking along a dirt path beside a calm river. Sunlight filters through the bridge structure creating dappled lighting on the ground. The rocky cliffs of the opposite bank are visible in the distance across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: railway bridge deck with passing steam train

events.description: steam locomotive with freight cars enters from right crossing the bridge
train emits thick black smoke as it passes overhead silhouetted against the sun

agents.ego_description: standing still looking up at the steam train passing overhead on the bridge

notable_agents.action: steam locomotive pulling freight cars across the bridge from right to left, emitting black smoke

entered.detail: black steam locomotive with multiple freight cars and caboose
thick dark smoke billowing from the locomotive stack against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts up to reveal the bridge deck against a bright blue sky as a steam train enters from the right. The locomotive emits thick black smoke as it rumbles across the iron structure, silhouetted by the sun. The train moves steadily from right to left across the frame, dominating the view as it passes directly overhead.

events.description: camera moves away from the bridge into the open riverside landscape
passing through leafy deciduous trees along the riverbank

agents.ego_description: walking along the riverbank away from the bridge, moving through grass and trees toward the rocky outcrop

entered.detail: green leafy trees along the riverbank with dense foliage
thin smoke rising from behind the rocky cliff face

segments.scene_description: After the train passes, the camera moves away from the bridge along the grassy riverbank. The massive steel structure recedes into the distance on the right while the view opens up to reveal rocky outcrops across the river and distant mountains. The camera passes through scattered trees along the gravel shoreline, with a thin plume of smoke visible rising from the cliffs ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins beneath a massive industrial railway bridge and gradually opens into a vast, natural riverside landscape. It begins by walking along a dirt path beside a calm river, where sunlight filters through the steel trestle to create dappled lighting on the ground. As the camera tilts upward, a steam locomotive enters from the right and rumbles across the iron structure, dominating the frame with thick black smoke silhouetted against a bright blue sky. Once the train passes, the camera moves away from the bridge along the grassy riverbank, allowing the steel structure to recede into the distance. The scene then expands to reveal rocky outcrops and distant mountains across the water before passing through scattered trees along the gravel shoreline toward a thin plume of smoke rising from the cliffs ahead.
